_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: we validated PDLIM2 overexpression in Ben Men-1 cells and in six tumour-derived primary cells compared to normal HMC
details: PDLIM2 was found overexpressed in Ben Men-1 cells compared to normal HMC by Western blot analysis
